item.title: CahairOKane1: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 7min A column on Rory McIlroy, Armagh, how so much analysis is blinded by results and hind
item.description: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 7min A column on Rory McIlroy, Armagh, how so much analysis is blinded by results and hindsight and why decisions live or die on their execution, constructed just to tell the story of having breakfast with Jordan Spieth’s caddy De irishnews.com 1 234

item.title: CahairOKane1: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 45min On week’s Monday Club podcast Breaking down Armagh’s win over Tyrone Antrim v Derr
item.description:

item.title: CahairOKane1: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 20min En respuesta a @CahairOKane1 397
BenColeyGolf: Maurice Brosnan reposteó Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 2h There are people, actual people, taking issue with Rory McIlroy im
item.description: Maurice Brosnan reposteó Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 2h There are people, actual people, taking issue with Rory McIlroy improving his Masters chances by practicing golf. What's especially funny is that a high percentage of these people will take no issue with players seeking to improve their chances by building new golf clubs. 30 13 374 17 mil
